description.value: Example codes for the kind of characteristic being described about a medication (physical properties, storage requirements, other observable or defining traits). Adapted from concepts previously carried by MedicationKnowledge.drugCharacteristic.type; provided as an illustrative set. These are just a demonstrative set of values, to depict the intended usage.

definition.value: Identifying marks on the product (e.g., letters or numbers stamped on a tablet).
Description of the size of the product (e.g., diameter or length of a tablet or capsule).
Description of the shape of the product (e.g., round, oval, triangular).
Description of the colour of the product.
Description of the coating of the product (e.g., sugar-coated, film-coated, enteric-coated).
Description of the scoring of the product (e.g., single score, cross score, unscored).
Description of the logo appearing on the product.
A visual image of the product.
Recommended or required storage temperature for the medication.
Recommended or required storage humidity conditions for the medication.
